day7_pivot_by_signal.rule: Day-7 MUST be a genuinely different pain point. A reframe of Day-0 does not perform.

day_7_new_angle.send_brief: For each lead in your 2026-05-12 Batch 5 send records: (1) IMAP sweep per lead first, (2) if IMAP clean, send Day-7 new-angle email with placeholders filled from send records, (3) if IMAP finds INTERESTED reply: cancel Day-7, use interested variant from daily_email_plan.json conditional_handling section, classify reply, 24h proposal SLA, log CHANGELOG. If NOT_INTERESTED: cancel Day-7, suppress all channels. If UNSUBSCRIBE: suppress within 24h GDPR Article 21.
day_7_new_angle.linkedin_archive_trigger: EOD TODAY Tuesday 2026-05-19 — fires for any Batch 5 lead without confirmed LinkedIn (note_sent: true in linkedin_profiles.json). No extensions.
day_7_new_angle.batch_6_trigger: If Day-7 replies ≥ 2 by Wednesday 2026-05-21 → fire Batch 6 scoping. Territory: Harrogate District + Craven District. Data collection from Wednesday 2026-05-20.

day_14_breakup.rule: Maximum 4 total touchpoints — Day-14 breakup is the FINAL email. Hard limit. No exceptions.

exclusions: Any lead that replied INTERESTED before 2026-05-26 — use proposal flow instead

before_day7_per_lead_today.if_clean: Send Day-7 new-angle email. Log CHANGELOG.
before_day7_per_lead_today.if_interested_reply_found: Use interested variant (daily_email_plan.json conditional_handling — reply in thread). Classify in reply_classifications.json. Proposal within 24h. Cancel Day-7 for that lead. Log CHANGELOG.
before_day7_per_lead_today.if_not_interested: Cancel Day-7 permanently. Suppress email. Block LinkedIn (archive trigger confirms no LinkedIn). Log CHANGELOG.
before_day7_per_lead_today.if_unsubscribe: Cancel Day-7. Suppress within 24h (GDPR Article 21). Log audit_log and CHANGELOG.
before_day7_per_lead_today.if_ooo: Pause Day-7. Note return date. Resume day after return if within Day-14 window (return must be before 2026-05-25). 4-touchpoint limit applies.
before_day7_per_lead_today.if_wrong_person: Pause Day-7. Investigate correct contact. Log CHANGELOG.
